name: Ironshade Company
specialty: Specializing in high-stakes heists and infiltrations, their meticulous planning and ability to adapt to the ever-shifting reality tears of the Undercity sets them apart.

members.name: Valtor Ironshade
members.note: Scarred face and missing right eye, a reminder of past battles and a constant reminder to his crew to stay vigilant

members.name: Zara Glassheart
members.note: Known for her keen senses and her ability to navigate the labyrinthine Warrens, her earring shaped like a shard of obsidian is a symbol of her Glass Sigil allegiance

members.name: Thorne Stonefist
members.note: His imposing stature and stone-hard fists have earned him a fearsome reputation, his battle-scarred warhammer is his constant companion

visual: Clad in dark leather and steel, they move with a purposeful stride through the Undercity, their Glass Sigil tattoos visible under the dim light of the city. Their gear is functional yet menacing, a clear warning to potential threats.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity: 'Don't cross the Ironshade Company, they'll find you and they won't ask questions.'
